validator_prompt: Review the research output as a senior researcher. Approve only if important claims are cited, fetched sources support the claims, provider/source coverage is sufficient, source appraisals and triangulation are adequate, contradictions/null evidence were actively considered, community data is labeled correctly, and remaining uncertainty is documented.

non_blocking_caveats: Meta remains partial: official SDK repo support is present, but developers.facebook.com Marketing API/Lead Ads/Webhooks/Conversions docs still require manual verification.
Microsoft offline/conversion feedback docs remain an explicit pre-implementation gap.
Compliance is correctly labeled as non-legal advice and counsel-gated.

automatic_validation.notes: Original noisy runner corpus was supplemented with fetched official-source records. One unfetched runner candidate is excluded from the validated roadmap.

provider_gaps: developers.facebook.com docs returned 400/404 in webfetch; official SDK repositories fetched as partial fallback
